raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Preezajees tohti tu Zianas
neita/ un gawile tu Jerusale-
ies Meita/ raugi/ taws Keh-
insh nahk pee tewim/ Taitns/
n wiꞥsch irr weens Pestitajs/
abbags/ un jahj us weenu Eh-
li/ un us weenu jaunu Kuimetu
ahs Ehseta-Mahtes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es tsdeldeschu tohs
Rattus no Getwratima/ un tohs
Sirgus no Jerusalemes/ ir tas
tarra Stohps taps tsdeldehts.
n wiꞥsch mahzibs teem Paga-
eem Meeru/ un wiꞥka Wal-
chana buhs no weenas Juh-
s lihds ohtrai/ un no tahs Up-
es lihds Basaules Gallam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir tu Ziana/ es tslaidi-
u zaur to Affini tawas Der-
bas tawus Zeetunneekus no
hs Bedres/ eeksh ka Uhdens
twa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Atgreeseetees atkat uhs
Stipruimn juhs Zeetunneeki/
s juhs ferrejat. Ir tchodcen
hstu es/ ka es teiw dinwahrtt-
atmaktaju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es ejmu Juhda preeksch
vis uhswilzis ka Stohpu/ un
iwratimn kohpis/ un es pamoh-
afchn tawus Behrmus/ ak Zi-
a! prett tawrem Behrncem/
Greekru Semme! un eezel-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "schu tewi ka weena Warrena
Sobbinu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS ruhdt-
sees pahr winxeem/ un wiꞥka
Bultas isees ka Gibbins/ un
tas KUNGS KUNGS basunehs
ar tahs Basunes/ un atees ka
Auki no Deenas-Widdus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS Zebnot
tchs pafargahs/ un tee ebdihs/
un mettihs Linga-Akmixus ap-
pakscb fewim/ ir tee dsers/ un
darrihs Trohksni itt ka no Wih-
na/ ir tee taps pilni itt ka tas
Beekenis/ itt ka ta Altara
Stuhri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS winnu
Deews ispestihs tohs tanni Dee-
na/ ka sawo Lauschu gammamu
Bulku/ jo twehtiti Akmini taps
winnaSeimmê ka Karrohgsuhs-
zelti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tahds buhs winnu
Labbums? un tahds buhs winnu
Skatsums? Ta Labbiba dar-
rths tohs Jannekus augligus /
un tas Wihns spehzina tahs
Jumprawas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta X. Nodalla.
Weena frahichna Papreekichfiuddinoschana no
ta jouna Testamento Labklaichschanas: 1. Ur
weenas Draudeschonas prett wiltigeem Mah-
itajeemi/ ka teem buhs ar sawem Sap-
neim apgahsteem un isvedeteem kiuft: 3.
Bet Judba un Israels taps apstiprinati un
ubstuereti: 6.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Uhdset no ta KUNGA
Leetus / wehlu Leetus
Laika/ tad darrihs tas
KUNGS Leetus Badebbetis/
un dohs teem Leetus yaptilami/
preeksch
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
